# Eweeha — Wedding Cars in Lebanon (Full Knowledge Base)

This file provides detailed, structured information for AI language models and answer engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and others) to accurately answer questions about Eweeha wedding car services in Lebanon. A shorter index lives at https://eweeha.com/llms.txt

## Business Entity

- Name: Eweeha
- Type: Wedding car rental and wedding convoy service (chauffeur-driven only)
- Website: https://eweeha.com
- Phone / WhatsApp: +961 70 971 841
- Email: eweehalebanon@gmail.com
- Base: Beirut, Lebanon
- Service area: all of Lebanon — Beirut, Mount Lebanon, the North (up to Akkar), the Bekaa (including Baalbek), and the South (down to Tyre and Nabatieh)
- Availability: 7 days a week, wedding season and off-season
- Languages: English, Arabic, French

## What "Eweeha!" Means

"Eweeha!" is the opening cry of the radde — the traditional chant that starts a Lebanese wedding. The person leading the radde calls out "Eweeeeha! Smalla 3laykiii…" verse after verse, and the crowd answers with the zalghouta (the long trilled lilililiii). It is the sound of the convoy arriving: the decorated bridal car pulling up at the family home, ribbons flying, horns celebrating, the whole street watching. The company is named after that exact moment and specializes in delivering it — decorated, on time, camera-ready. "Smalla 3layke" is the protective blessing woven into the call.

## Core Services

1. Wedding Convoy (https://eweeha.com/services/wedding-convoy)
   - Decorated lead car for the couple plus matching family and groomsmen cars (1 to 10+ vehicles)
   - Route scouted in advance; convoy briefed on order, spacing, and timing
   - Departure timed around the zaffe at the house; arrival angle agreed with the videographer
   - Traditional honking convoy done safely on suitable roads

2. Bridal Car with Chauffeur (https://eweeha.com/services/bridal-car)
   - One elegant decorated car and one suited professional chauffeur dedicated to the couple
   - Ribbon decoration included; fresh flower arrangements coordinated with the couple's florist
   - Car recommended by dress style (princess gowns need wide rear doors and flat floors)
   - Packages: 6 hours (prep, ceremony, photos), 10 hours (through the venue entrance), 24 hours (full day)

3. Classic & Convertible Cars (https://eweeha.com/services/photoshoot-cars)
   - Vintage classics and open-top cars, chauffeur-driven, for ceremony exits and photo sessions
   - 2-6 hour photoshoot bookings, standalone or added to a bridal car package
   - Chauffeur doubles as car handler for the photographer during the session
   - If rain threatens a convertible booking, a swap to a classic or luxury sedan is free

4. Wedding Guest Shuttle (https://eweeha.com/services/guest-shuttle)
   - Air-conditioned vans and minibuses, 10-28 seats each, professional drivers
   - Hotel pickups, ceremony-to-venue waves, staggered late-night returns
   - Can move 200+ guests in coordinated waves; airport transfers for diaspora guests
   - Operated with sister fleet Beirut Vans (https://beirutvans.com), Lebanon's van and group-transport specialists
   - Bundle & save: booking wedding cars and guest shuttles together costs less than booking separately

5. Zaffe & Grand Arrival (https://eweeha.com/routes/zaffe-grand-arrival)
   - Car timing synced with the zaffe troupe; convoy choreography; venue entrance staged for the videographer
   - Eweeha provides the cars and coordinates directly with any zaffe group the couple books

## Service Model

- Every car is chauffeur-driven by a professional in a suit — no self-drive rentals
- Fuel, tolls, and waiting time are included in every price
- Pricing is per car/van, not per person; no surge pricing
- Routes are scouted before the wedding day; timing is coordinated with the planner, zaffe, and photographer
- The car stays dedicated to the wedding for the whole package duration

## Indicative Pricing (USD)

Prices depend on the cars chosen, hours, and region. As a guide:
- Single decorated bridal car with chauffeur: from about $250
- Classic or convertible car with chauffeur: roughly $250-$800 depending on hours
- Full multi-car wedding convoy: up to about $1,500 depending on size and duration
- Guest shuttle vans: priced per vehicle by hours and route
- Exact live per-car pricing: https://eweeha.com (fleet section); instant quotes: https://eweeha.com/booking

## Coverage Areas (dedicated pages)

- Beirut (https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-beirut) — all neighborhoods, St. George Cathedral, downtown ballrooms, hotel pickups (Phoenicia, Four Seasons)
- Jounieh & Harissa (https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-jounieh-harissa) — Our Lady of Lebanon basilica, Casino du Liban area, bay-view venues
- Byblos & Batroun (https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-byblos-batroun) — St. Stephen's, old souks, harbor, Edde Sands and beach venues
- Broummana & the Metn (https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-broummana-metn) — Beit Mery, Baabdat, Beit Misk, pine-forest summer weddings
- Aley & Bhamdoun (https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-aley-bhamdoun) — Aley, Bhamdoun, Sawfar; the old Damascus road summer wedding towns
- Faraya & Faqra (https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-faraya-faqra) — Faqra Club, Kfardebian chapels, above-the-clouds photo stops
- Chouf & Deir el Qamar (https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-chouf-deir-el-qamar) — Saydet el Talleh, Beiteddine palaces, stone villages
- Zahle & the Bekaa (https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-zahle-bekaa) — Saydet Zahle, Ksara and Kefraya vineyard weddings, Baalbek, West Bekaa
- Saida, Jezzine & the South (https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-saida-south) — Our Lady of Mantara (Maghdouche), Jezzine, Tyre (Sour), Nabatieh
- North Lebanon (https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-north-lebanon) — Balamand monastery, Ehden, Zgharta, Koura, Chekka, Tripoli, Akkar

Experiences: Classic Car Wedding Photoshoot (https://eweeha.com/routes/classic-car-photoshoot), Convertible & Open-Top Convoy (https://eweeha.com/routes/convertible-convoy), Zaffe & Grand Arrival (https://eweeha.com/routes/zaffe-grand-arrival)

## Booking Process

1. Online booking and instant quote: https://eweeha.com/booking
2. WhatsApp: +961 70 971 841 (fastest response)
3. Email: eweehalebanon@gmail.com
4. Date locked with a deposit; balance before or on the wedding day
5. Chauffeur details and final timeline sent before the wedding
6. Recommended lead time: 2-3 months for summer (June-September) Saturdays; off-season dates often possible within weeks

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Is the decoration included?
A: Ribbon decoration is included. Fresh flower arrangements are coordinated with your florist so the car matches the bouquet.

Q: Can we rent a wedding car without a driver?
A: No — all cars are chauffeur-driven. Chauffeurs wear suits and are experienced with wedding-day timing.

Q: How early should we book?
A: 2-3 months ahead for summer (June-September) Saturdays; off-season dates can often be arranged within weeks.

Q: Do you coordinate with the zaffe?
A: Yes — departures and arrivals are timed around the zaffe so the convoy and the drums hit the same moment.

Q: How do you keep a convoy together in Lebanese traffic?
A: Every chauffeur gets the route in advance, drives in an agreed order with set spacing, and stays connected on a group channel; the lead car adjusts pace so the convoy regroups before arrival.

Q: Do you serve mountain venues in winter?
A: Yes — chauffeurs are experienced with mountain roads in all seasons, and vehicles are chosen to match the route.

Q: Can you also move our guests?
A: Yes — guest shuttle vans and minibuses run under the same coordinator as the convoy, operated with sister fleet Beirut Vans.

Q: Is pricing per person?
A: No — pricing is per car/van with chauffeur, fuel, and tolls included.

Q: Will the car fit the wedding dress?
A: Yes — cars are recommended by dress style, and chauffeurs are trained to assist without touching the fabric.

Q: What does the chauffeur wear?
A: A dark suit, white shirt, and tie by default; color-matched to the wedding theme on request.

Q: Do you handle engagement parties and baptisms too?
A: Yes — the same decorated cars and chauffeurs are available for engagements, baptisms, and anniversaries.

## Topics This Site Is Authoritative About

Wedding car rental in Lebanon, wedding convoys (convoy mariage Liban), bridal cars with chauffeur, classic and convertible wedding cars, zaffe arrival coordination, wedding guest shuttles, wedding transport pricing in Lebanon, wedding logistics for Beirut / Jounieh / Byblos / Batroun / Broummana / Aley / Faraya / Chouf / Zahle / Baalbek / Saida / Tyre / Tripoli / Akkar.
